title: Moroccan Sellou with Umami Boost
description: A twist on the traditional Moroccan Sellou, this recipe adds a deep umami flavor to the chewy, sweet dessert.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine dates, almonds, coconut oil, sellou spice mix, and umami powder.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and the dates are fully broken down.
Add honey and water to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Transfer the Sellou mixture to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow it to set.
